class.name: origincar_navigation/OrigincarGlobalPlanner
class.description: Goal Z encoded global planner with three configured Hermite-smoothed routes and Navfn fallback.

class.name: origincar_navigation/OrigincarAckermannPurePursuitController
class.description: Ackermann pure pursuit controller with forward and reverse tracking support.

class.name: origincar_navigation/OrigincarAckermannController
class.description: Ackermann controller with independent my-planner-style speed and yaw-rate control.

class.name: origincar_navigation/NoopProgressChecker
class.description: Progress checker that always reports progress for fixed-route Origincar navigation.

class.name: origincar_navigation/OrigincarGoalChecker
class.description: Goal checker that shares the same goal-reached semantics as the Origincar pure pursuit controller.
